description: **Breaking: sealed reporter outcome model.** CheckResult removed; check handlers now receive a ceiling-typed reporter (ErrorReporter / WarnReporter) and return outcomes via reporter.passed / reporter.found / reporter.skipped. Registration via @app.error_check / @app.warn_check replaces @app.check.
**Fix: global-flag config-conflict now checked in post-command position.** Flags placed after the command token are now conflict-checked against config values, matching the pre-command behavior.
